# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
## What's Changed in runners-controller@0.3.0<!-- RELEASE NOTES START -->

### ⛰️  Features

* Linux runners on Hetzner Robot bare metal with Kata Containers QEMU microVMs and queue-driven autoscaling by [@fortmarek](https://github.com/fortmarek) in [#10794](https://github.com/tuist/tuist/pull/10794)
